issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases, focusing only on happy path.

scenarios.name: Design a SaaS referral program with K-factor projection
scenarios.rationale: Baseline suggested a generic single-sided referral; treatment proposed double-sided rewards, triggered on a qualifying action (not signup) to prevent fraud, capped rewards per user, and projected K = invites_per_user x conversion_rate_per_invite as the skill prescribes.

scenarios.name: Lift onboarding activation from 23% to 35% with A/B tests
scenarios.rationale: Baseline proposed loose copy/UX tests; treatment identified the aha moment by comparing retained vs churned behavior, sized variants with n = (Z^2 x p x (1-p)) / MDE^2, and committed to a 1-2 week minimum with no early peeking, matching the skill's discipline.
